subject: Verify live ComfyUI runtime visibility for 26 canonical Main Flow model references

context.lane3_local_result: 26 of 26 exact references present under C:\Comfy_UI\Runtime_Data\models with SHA256 hashes recorded.

constraints: Do not start or stop EC2 on behalf of Lane 3.
Do not print secrets from C:\Comfy_UI\.env.
Do not commit ignored live state from Main\shared_state\ec2_requests.
Treat Lane 3 local path/hash evidence as file placement only; runtime dropdown/catalog/load visibility still needs proof.

requested_checks.requested_evidence: Confirm each exact name appears in the live checkpoint dropdown/object_info data.
Confirm exact name appears in live diffusion_models/unet dropdown/object_info data.
Confirm exact name appears in live text encoder / clip dropdown/object_info data.
Confirm exact name appears in live VAE dropdown/object_info data.
Confirm each exact name appears in live ControlNet dropdown/object_info data.
Confirm exact name appears in live upscale model dropdown/object_info data.
Confirm each exact relative LoRA name appears in live LoRA catalog/dropdown data. If rgthree presents paths differently, record the exact visible name and mapping.

minimum_acceptance: Attach or record live /object_info or equivalent runtime catalog evidence for each loader family.
Classify each expected name as visible, not visible, or visible under alternate display name.

Run the smallest safe smoke check needed to prove the runtime can at least catalog/load representative SDXL, Flux, Z-Image, ControlNet, VAE, upscale, text-encoder, and LoRA families, or return an exact blocker with next action.
